title: polypodium polypodioides subsp. ecklonii
intro: Polypodium polypodioides subsp. ecklonii, also known as the Cape Chain Fern, is a species of fern native to South Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Polypodium polypodioides subsp. ecklonii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a tonic for the nervous system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to various health conditions.
